description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest print and print on the back, World FC logo printed on the right sleeve and ribbing around the inner neckFittingStandardWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron on the print Do not dry clean From music to the bold logo that honours the game, the nike WFC Mano men's t-shirt covers it all. A tribute to the Small-Sided World football Collective, this T-shirt features a comfortable, standard Fit.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
